_doc: Lab RAG defaults. Edit this file to switch models, providers, or throttle. CLI flags (--gemini-model, --anthropic-model, --model) still override these on a per-call basis. CLAUDE.md §12.

drafter._provider_note: Currently only 'gemini' is supported for the drafter. The drafter ReAct loop is wired to GeminiClient.generate(list[Message]).
drafter._throttle_note: Min seconds between calls to avoid free-tier RPM 429s. Gemini 3.5 Flash = 1000 RPM (0.06s min); Gemini 2.5 Flash = 5 RPM free tier (set 13.0). Set 0 to disable throttle.

judge._provider_note: Set 'gemini' to run the judge on Gemini (single API key), or 'anthropic' to use claude-sonnet-4-5 (requires ANTHROPIC_API_KEY).
